# Snapshot install scenario.
# 1. 3-node cluster, leader proposes 5 entries.
# 2. Add node 4 via ConfChange so it is part of the cluster ConfState.
# 3. Leader compacts up to index 5; its storage drops entries 1..5.
# 4. Node 4 starts fresh with empty log.
# 5. Leader tries to sendAppend to 4 but discovers prev index < firstIndex,
#    so it switches Progress(4) to StateSnapshot and sends MsgSnapshot.
# 6. After stabilize, node 4 has caught up via snapshot.

add-nodes id=1,2,3 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0
INFO 2 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 2 became follower at term 0
INFO 3 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 3 became follower at term 0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StateCandidate at term 1

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3

# Make some progress so we have something to compact.
propose id=1 data=e1
----
ok

propose id=1 data=e2
----
ok

propose id=1 data=e3
----
ok

propose id=1 data=e4
----
ok

propose id=1 data=e5
----
ok

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=6
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=6
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=6
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=6 lastIndex=6

# Apply v4 conf change on ALL nodes so the snapshot we take next includes
# the {1,2,3,4} ConfState. Order matters: snapshot ConfState is read from
# the leader's tracker at snapshot creation time.
apply-conf-change id=1 changes=v4
----
voters=(1 2 3 4) learners=() auto-leave=false

apply-conf-change id=2 changes=v4
----
voters=(1 2 3 4) learners=() auto-leave=false

apply-conf-change id=3 changes=v4
----
voters=(1 2 3 4) learners=() auto-leave=false

# Take a snapshot at index 6 (includes the conf change entry for v4) and
# compact storage up to 6. After this, leader's storage retains entries
# from index 7 onward (or just the snapshot if empty).
create-snapshot id=1 index=6
----
snapshot index=6 term=1

compact id=1 index=6
----
compacted to index=6

log-state id=1
----
id=1 firstIndex=7 lastIndex=6 committed=6 applied=6

# Create node 4 (fresh storage, empty log, but with the {1,2,3,4} ConfState).
add-nodes id=4 voters=1,2,3,4
----
INFO 4 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3 4)
INFO 4 became follower at term 0

# Leader's progress map already includes node 4 with match=0. When the
# leader broadcasts, it will try to sendAppend(4), discover prevIndex < firstIndex,
# and switch to StateSnapshot.
stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=6
> 4 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 4 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 4
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=6
> 4 receiving MsgSnapshot from 1
> 4 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=6
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 4

# Node 4 should now have caught up via snapshot, and the leader's view of
# its progress should be StateReplicate.
progress id=1
----
1: StateReplicate match=6 next=7
2: StateReplicate match=6 next=7
3: StateReplicate match=6 next=7
4: StateReplicate match=6 next=7

status id=4
----
id=4 state=StateFollower term=1 lead=1 commit=6 lastIndex=6

log-state id=4
----
id=4 firstIndex=7 lastIndex=6 committed=6 applied=6
